scenarioTitle: Beginner meal logging with macro auto-calc
stepsSummary: Log meals with protein/carbs/fat and rely on calorie auto-calc guidance.
expectedSummary: Macro-derived calories are applied and recent food list is accurate.
actualResult: Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/

summary: BUG: UAT-005 Beginner meal logging with macro auto-calc - Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
reproSteps: For a meal, enter protein/carbs/fat without manual calories.
Validate calories auto-populate as 4/4/9 macro formula before submit.
Submit meal and repeat for multiple meals.
Verify recent-food list count and names.
expected: Macro-derived calories are applied and recent food list is accurate.
actual: Error: [INFRA:SERVER_UNREACHABLE] Playwright could not reach the FitOne dev server during test setup. baseURL=http://127.0.0.1:4173. Original error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://127.0.0.1:4173/
recommendation: Fix the failing Nutrition flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-005 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Auto-calculated calories match macro formula.
Verify: No data loss or duplication in recent list.
